En: The spread pattern of these bullet holes makes your chest ache. Your breath grows heavier.
Zh: 四周密布的弹孔让你的胸口感到一阵疼痛。你的呼吸变得沉重起来。

En: Kim, look... more bullet holes. Someone has been shot here.
Zh: “金，看…还有好多弹孔。有人在这里中枪了。”

En: Another set of awfully old bullet holes.
Zh: 又是一连串可怕的陈旧弹孔。

En: More old bullet holes, at least half a century. A different era altogether.
Zh: 更多的弹孔，至少已经存在了半个世纪。那是一个完全不同的时代。

En: [Discard thought.]
Zh: [放弃思维。]

En: The lieutenant inspects the wall, then nods. "Another set of old bullet holes from the Revolution."
Zh: 警督查看了墙壁，然后点点头。“又是大革命时期留下的旧弹孔。”

En: Man, how many people got shot during that Revolution?
Zh: “我的天，到底有多少人在大革命的时候被杀了？”

En: Figured as much. [Discard thought.]
Zh: “我也这么觉得。”[放弃思维。]

En: More old bullet holes, half a century at least, from the Revolution.
Zh: 更多的弹孔，至少已经存在了半个世纪，应该是大革命时期留下的。

En: A history of violence streaking all across Revachol.
Zh: “瑞瓦肖本身就是一部暴力史。”

En: Plenty.
Zh: “很多。”

En: The streets ran red with blood. Dust swirled above the ruins. The pressure change from artillery fire ripped people apart in the top floors of the building above you...
Zh: 街道被鲜血染红。尘土在废墟上方盘绕。炮火引起气压变化，将上方建筑顶层的人们撕成了碎片…

En: Examine closer.
Zh: 仔细靠近查看。

En: You peer into the faded marks in the stone... they peer back like an endless row of tiny black holes. Sweat starts trickling down your brow.
Zh: 你凝视着石头上褪色的痕迹…它们就像一排无穷无尽的小黑洞回望着你。汗水渐渐从你的额角滑落。

En: These bullet holes look like the bullet holes we saw before.
Zh: “这些弹孔跟我们之前看到的弹孔很像。”

En: Bullet holes generally look the same, so... probably. He leans in to inspect the wall. "But you are right, more old bullet holes from the Revolution."
Zh: “一般来说，弹孔都长得很像，所以…也许是吧。”他倾身向前，查看着墙壁。“不过你是对的，确实是大革命时期留下的旧弹孔。”

En: What's with all these bullet holes? I've seen a lot of them around.
Zh: “这些弹孔到底是怎么回事？我在附近看到不少。”

En: The lieutenant looks at the wall. "Remnants from the Revolution. These are over half a century old."
Zh: 警督看着墙。“大革命的残留品，应该有大半个世纪了。”

En: Okay. But what can you tell me about the Revolution?
Zh: “好吧。那你能跟我说说这个大革命吗？”

En: Not much. I don't have a *fresh perspective* on it. Should we go?
Zh: “没什么可说的。毕竟我不能提供什么*新鲜的视角*。可以走了吗？”

En: No, we're not constructors and renovators. And these bullet holes do not warrant an investigation.
Zh: “不，我们不是建筑工人，也不是翻修工人。再说这些弹孔跟调查也没什么关系。”

En: So, no crime has happened here?
Zh: “所以说，这里没有发生罪案了？”

En: Perhaps *a* crime of a sort, ages ago... but no, these do not warrant an investigation.
Zh: “也许很久以前，有过*某种*罪案…不过没有，这跟调查没什么关系。”

En: Is there something we should do about these?
Zh: “我们应该做点什么吗？”

En: Never mind, then. Let's go. [Discard thought.]
Zh: “那没事了。我们走吧。”[放弃思维。]

En: The lieutenant nods.
Zh: 警督点点头。

En: This is bad mojo, man! Fuckin' horrible mojo. The end draws near!
Zh: 这是可怕的咒语，伙计！该死的恐怖咒语！末日就要降临了！

En: Your chest feels tight, looking at them. It's closing in... caving in, ever tighter. Your breathing grows even heavier.
Zh: 眼前的景象让你胸口发紧。越来越近…越来越深，越揪越紧。你的呼吸变得沉重起来。

En: You okay there? The lieutenant's sudden voice cuts like a blade, bringing you out of the stupor.
Zh: “你没事吧？”警督突然开口，他的声音就像一柄利刃，将你带出了恍惚状态。

En: (Breathe out sharply.) "Huh, yeah-yeah, I'm fine."
Zh: （大呼一口气。）“哈，嗯嗯，我没事。”

En: Man, I started feeling really bad for a second.
Zh: “天，刚才有那么一瞬间我感觉非常糟糕。”

En: You were looking pale there for a second. What are you looking at?
Zh: “刚才你的脸色很苍白。你在看什么呢？”

En: Might be the after-effects of your... past escapades. What are you looking at?
Zh: “可能是你过去越轨行为的一种…副作用。你在看什么呢？”

En: The paintbrush in your hand is like a loaded revolver. What will it be, desperado? Quite a few things come to mind...
Zh: 你手中的漆刷就是一把上膛的手枪。你想画什么呢，亡命之徒？你的脑子里冒出了好几个想法……

En: MOTHER OF ALL WALLS
Zh: “墙壁之母”

En: RENE LIVES!
Zh: “雷内永生！”

En: Let the wall remain blank. For now. [Leave.]
Zh: 还是让墙就这么空着吧。暂时如此。[离开。]

En: WHAT SHADOW LIES THERE, BENEATH THE BRIGHT GLEAM
Zh: “有光才有影”

En: Very poetic. The lieutenant nods in appreciation -- it doesn't sound sincere. "Real poetry. Should we return to our murder investigation? I hear there's a really *bad* one we're supposed to solve."
Zh: “很有诗意。”警督赞赏地点点头——但听起来并不真诚。“货真价实的诗歌。我们可以继续回去调查了吗？听说有一个真心*糟糕*的案件正等着我们去解决。”

En: Hmh... Just a hum. No reply.
Zh: 只是哼了一声。没有回应。

En: FUCK THE POLICE
Zh: “警察去死”

En: The lieutenant looks at the wall in dismay:
Zh: 警督沮丧地看着墙壁：

En: But we *are* the police...
Zh: “但是我们*就是*警察啊……”

En: Yeah -- fuck us.
Zh: “是啊——我们该死。”

En: You're right, you're right. Is it too late to change it?
Zh: “对啊，你说得对啊。现在想改是不是太晚了？”

En: But why? We work twelve-hour shifts. We get shot at, spat on...
Zh: “但是为什么呢？我们要轮班12小时。更别提还会中枪，会被吐口水……”

En: The lieutenant raises his eyebrows, then sighs.
Zh: 警督扬起眉头，然后叹了口气。

En: Hah! Maybe there's a *reason* for that!
Zh: 哈！也许这都是有*原因*的！

En: The wall towers over you with its indelible message.
Zh: 墙上那难以磨灭的信息高出了你一大截。

En: But what do we work on? KEEPING EVERYTHING THE WAY IT IS.
Zh: “但是我们在做什么呢？就是要让一切保持应有的样子。”

En: Keep it to yourself.
Zh: 保守这个秘密吧。

En: You've spoken. The wall will now silently repeat the message -- for a decade or so, until the sea air degrades the paint.
Zh: 你开了口。现在墙壁会安静地重复这条信息——持续大约10年左右，直到海风降解了油漆。

En: THIS IS REALLY A MIRROR
Zh: “这真的是面镜子”

En: Paintbrush -- check, heavy fuel oil -- check... Now the only thing left to do is paint the wall.
Zh: 漆刷——检查完毕，重燃油——检查完毕…现在唯一要做的，就是粉刷墙壁。

En: You've spoken. The wall will now silently repeat the message. For a decade or so, until the sea air degrades the paint, adding another layer of *detritus* to the city.
Zh: 你开了口。现在墙壁会安静地重复这条信息，持续大约10年左右，直到海风降解了油漆，给这座城市再增添一层*残渣*。

En: I LOVE YOU CUNO
Zh: “我爱坤诺”

En: (Draw a 3,500 year old pictogram of a human being.)
Zh: （画一个3500岁的人类象形图）

En: SOMETHING BEAUTIFUL IS GOING TO HAPPEN
Zh: “好事即将到来”

En: You've spoken. The wall will now silently repeat the message. For a decade or so, until the sea air degrades the paint, adding another layer of *detritus* to the city.
Zh: 你开了口。现在墙壁会安静地重复这条信息，持续大约10年左右，直到海风降解了油漆，给这座城市再增添一层*残渣*。

En: NO PARKING
Zh: “禁止停车”
